location.description: The location of the cloud run service

template.description: The template to use for the service
template.type: list(object({ revision: optional(string), containers: list(object({ name: string, image: string, command: list(string), resources:list(object({ cpu: number, memory: string, nvidia_com_gpu: optional(number), startup_cpu_boost: optional(bool)})), env: list(object({name: string, value: string})), ports: list(object({name: string, container_port: number})), liveness_initial_delay_seconds: number, liveness_period_seconds: number, liveness_timeout_seconds: number, liveness_failure_threshold: optional(number), liveness_path: optional(string), liveness_port: optional(number), startup_initial_delay_seconds: number, startup_period_seconds: number, startup_timeout_seconds: number, startup_failure_threshold: optional(number), startup_path: optional(string), startup_port: optional(number), volume_mounts_name: string, volume_mounts_path: string})), min_instance_count: number, max_instance_count: number, egress: string, connector: optional(string), network: string, subnetwork: optional(string), volumes: list(object({ name: string, secret: list(object({secret: string, version: optional(string), path: string})) }))}))

deletion_protection.description: Whether Terraform will be prevented from destroying the service.

labels.description: Cloud Run API v2 does not support labels with run.googleapis.com, cloud.googleapis.com, serving.knative.dev, or autoscaling.knative.dev namespaces

ingress.description: The ingress settings for the service

launch_stage.description: The launch stage of the service

timeout.description: The maximum amount of time in Seconds that the service can take to respond to a request. Ex: 60s, 20s

service_account.description: The service account represents the identity of the running revision, and determines what permissions the revision has

encryption_key.description: A reference to a customer managed encryption key (CMEK) to use to encrypt this container image
